description_long: This is a single-story wooden house with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn with a concrete walkway and foundation. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored wood planks, and the house features a prominent gable roof with multiple intersecting sections. Large windows are distributed across the facade, with a mix of square and rectangular shapes, providing ample natural light. The front entryway is defined by a small covered porch with steps leading up to a single door, flanked by windows. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a partially open interior space, suggesting an unfinished or partially constructed state.
description: A single-story wooden house with a gable roof, large windows, and a small covered front porch set on a green lawn with a concrete walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a small porch, steps, and large windows on either side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the intersecting gable roof sections and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Back view with a secondary door and smaller windows, as well as a partially open interior space visible.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the angular rooflines and a mix of large and small windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Single front door with a small covered porch, steps, and flanking windows
